title: Ez Coordinates
description: A clean coordinates HUD mod with biome, world info, colors, and movable display.
body:
EzCoordinates

Ez Coordinates is a simple and customizable Minecraft Fabric mod that adds a clean coordinates HUD to your screen.

It shows useful information such as:
- X, Y, Z coordinates
- Current biome
- Current world/dimension

You can customize the HUD through the Mod Menu settings. Ez Coordinates includes a Move HUD screen, color settings with custom ARGB hex colors, preset colors, and a Show Shadows toggle.

Features:
- Clean coordinates HUD
- Shows X/Y/Z
- Shows biome
- Shows world/dimension
- Moveable HUD position
- Custom ARGB hex colors
- Preset colors: Red, Blue, Green, Purple, Yellow, Orange, White
- Show Shadows option
- Built with EzLib

Required:
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- EzLib

This mod requires EzLib to work.
